languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

languages.text: "Какой абсурд! Мой кибернетический спутник — лишь вспомогательный инструмент. Он гораздо менее утончен, чем Нунциус, и не обладает его выдающимися коммуникативными навыками и острым умом".
"A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."
languages.original_text: "Какой абсурд! Мой кибернетический спутник — лишь вспомогательный инструмент. Он гораздо менее утончен, чем Нунциус, и не обладает его выдающимися коммуникативными навыками и острым умом".

traits.locale_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."
"A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."
"A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

languages.text: «¡Absurdo! Mi compañero cibernético no es más que una herramienta auxiliar. Es mucho menos sofisticado que Nuncius y carece de sus excelentes capacidades comunicativas y su agudo intelecto».
languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

traits.locale_text: «¡Absurdo! Mi compañero cibernético no es más que una herramienta auxiliar. Es mucho menos sofisticado que Nuncius y carece de sus excelentes capacidades comunicativas y su agudo intelecto».

languages.text: “荒谬至极！我那个机械伙伴只是一个辅助工具。它远不如努恩修斯精密，也没有他那样出色的沟通能力和敏捷的思维。”
languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

traits.locale_text: “荒谬至极！我那个机械伙伴只是一个辅助工具。它远不如努恩修斯精密，也没有他那样出色的沟通能力和敏捷的思维。”

languages.text: « Quelle idée ridicule ! Mon compagnon cybernétique n'est qu'un simple outil auxiliaire. Il est bien moins sophistiqué que Nuncius et n'a certainement pas ses talents en communication et sa remarquable intelligence. »
languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

traits.locale_text: « Quelle idée ridicule ! Mon compagnon cybernétique n'est qu'un simple outil auxiliaire. Il est bien moins sophistiqué que Nuncius et n'a certainement pas ses talents en communication et sa remarquable intelligence. »

languages.text: "Eine absonderliche Vorstellung! Mein kybernetischer Gefährte ist lediglich ein Hilfswerkzeug. Er ist weit weniger komplex als Nuncius und hat weder seine herausragenden kommunikativen Fähigkeiten, noch seinen scharfen Intellekt."
languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

traits.locale_text: "Eine absonderliche Vorstellung! Mein kybernetischer Gefährte ist lediglich ein Hilfswerkzeug. Er ist weit weniger komplex als Nuncius und hat weder seine herausragenden kommunikativen Fähigkeiten, noch seinen scharfen Intellekt."

languages.text: 「とんでもない考えだ！私のサイバネティック・コンパニオンは単なる補助ツールにすぎない。ヌンキウスよりはるかに洗練されていないし、彼の卓越したコミュニケーション能力や鋭い知性もない。」
languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

traits.locale_text: 「とんでもない考えだ！私のサイバネティック・コンパニオンは単なる補助ツールにすぎない。ヌンキウスよりはるかに洗練されていないし、彼の卓越したコミュニケーション能力や鋭い知性もない。」

languages.text: "Akıl almaz bir düşünce! Siber yoldaşım, alt tarafı yardımcı bir araç. Nuncius kadar sofistike değil, onun olağanüstü iletişim becerilerinden ve keskin zekâsından da yoksun."
languages.original_text: "A preposterous notion! My cybernetic companion is merely an auxiliary tool. It is far less sophisticated than Nuncius, and lacks his outstanding communication skills and sharp intellect."

traits.locale_text: "Akıl almaz bir düşünce! Siber yoldaşım, alt tarafı yardımcı bir araç. Nuncius kadar sofistike değil, onun olağanüstü iletişim becerilerinden ve keskin zekâsından da yoksun."
